author: 0xjuliaglxy
content: where is the discussion on EIP-8080, EIP-8071 (declined why?) and EIP-8061 continued? Eth Magicians seems completely dead cc <@520034910149410861> <@680234424037670912>

author: .paulharris
content:
EIP-8061 - thats the place for discussion and it looks like no further comment, and I haven't been involved in anything else. If you do have comments then I'd suggest joining the conversation there basically
EIP-8071 - forkcast page here: https://forkcast.org/eips/8071 and links to ACDC that declined it but haven't watched for more context
EIP-8080 looks still cfi according to forkcast https://forkcast.org/eips/8080,  so ethereum magicians or acdc is most likely place for conversation
